title: Everlasting Tools
description: Modification inspired by tinkers' construct and silentgear that allows you to make "better than vanilla" tools.
body:
Modification adds some ores, two "machines" and blueprints which allow to craft custom sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel and hoe as final products.

To see recipes install JEI [Just Enough Items].

Every material tagged as "everlastingtools:tool_materials" gets its own config file with statistics that are necessary for making parts of tools.

Every material tagged as "everlastingtools:mixing_materials" can be used to fuse materials into fused material which also can be used to make parts of tools.

Check out the gallery to see examples of the tools you can create.

You can use modification in your modpack if you want.

Modification is only on curseforge and modrinth.
